combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
The Porter Beer Bar |  Lunch, Dinner, Takeout | Little Five Points | Inman Park | Candler Park | Old Fourth Ward | Edgewood | Poncey- Highland â "Discover the heart of Little Five Points at our cozy beer cellar bar. Indulge in craft brews, friendly vibes, and local flair. Join us for a pint and experienc
Skip to content
An Atlanta staple since 2008, known for our vast selection of craft beer and great food, weâve recently added even more drafts to our list, increasing the total to 60. Chef and the team in the kitchen can be relied upon for the old favoritesâsalt & vinegar popcorn, goat cheese fritters, and the famous pretzelâon top of a constantly evolving seasonal menu.
We aim to have the best-in-class draft list, constantly tapping beers from brewers near and far that we are most excited about! If youâre not a craft beer enthusiast, donât worryâwe have curated cocktail and wine lists, ciders, meads, and a variety of non-alcoholic offerings. For those looking for cellar-aged beer, youâve come to the right place: choose from a list of over 800 different bottles cared for and stored in our Beer Cellar (a beautiful room that also happens to double as a private event space available to book!)
The Porterâs Vintage Beer Cellar
Available for private parties & events
Book The Beer Cellar
